hero.title: Protect. Investigate.
hero.subtitle: Titan OSINT delivers enterprise-grade OSINT tools, cybersecurity services, and threat intelligence to organizations and professionals worldwide.

services.title: Enterprise Cybersecurity
services.subtitle: From threat intelligence to penetration testing — we cover the full spectrum of digital security.

osint.title: OSINT Intelligence
osint.desc: Deep open-source intelligence gathering across social media, dark web, and public records.

pentest.title: Penetration Testing
pentest.desc: Simulate real-world attacks to identify vulnerabilities before adversaries do.

threat.title: Threat Intelligence
threat.desc: Real-time threat feeds, IOC analysis, and proactive threat hunting for your organization.

forensics.title: Digital Forensics
forensics.desc: Incident response, evidence collection, and forensic analysis for legal and compliance needs.

training.title: Security Training
training.desc: Hands-on workshops, CTF challenges, and certification programs for security teams.

audit.title: Security Audits
audit.desc: Comprehensive security assessments aligned with ISO 27001, NIST, and SOC 2 frameworks.

tools.title: Powerful Security
tools.subtitle: Battle-tested tools used by security researchers, analysts, and investigators worldwide.

emailTracer.name: Email Tracer
emailTracer.desc: Trace email origins, verify addresses, and uncover linked accounts.

ipIntel.name: IP Intelligence
ipIntel.desc: Geolocation, ASN lookup, threat scoring, and reverse DNS for any IP.

domainRecon.name: Domain Recon
domainRecon.desc: WHOIS, DNS records, subdomains, and certificate transparency analysis.

socialScan.name: Social Scanner
socialScan.desc: Find usernames across 400+ platforms with breach correlation.

hashDecoder.name: Hash Decoder
hashDecoder.desc: Identify hash types and attempt decryption via multiple algorithms.

webCrawler.name: Web Crawler
webCrawler.desc: Extract metadata, links, and hidden content from any public webpage.

about.title: Built by Security
about.subtitle: Titan OSINT was founded by a team of cybersecurity veterans, former intelligence analysts, and ethical hackers united by one mission: democratize security intelligence.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Make enterprise-grade security tools and intelligence accessible to every organization, security team, and researcher — regardless of size or budget.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: A world where defenders have every advantage they need to stay ahead of evolving threats and protect the digital ecosystem.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: Seasoned experts from government, enterprise, and open-source communities.

contact.title: Ready to Secure
contact.subtitle: Talk to our team about your security needs. We respond within 24 hours.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Next-generation cybersecurity intelligence for the modern threat landscape.
